message:
fix(test): eliminate flaky test failures from shared global state

1. runtime_policy: Skip custom panic hook in test mode (#[cfg(test)] early
   return). The hook called mark_kernel_broken() on any panic including normal
   test assertions, poisoning the kernel singleton for all subsequent tests.
   131/131 lib tests now pass reliably (verified 5/5 runs).

2. stdlib_abi_test: Serialize random() and drand48() family tests with
   per-family mutexes. These POSIX APIs use process-global PRNG state;
   parallel test execution caused non-deterministic interleaving of
   seed/generate operations. Tests using caller-supplied state (erand48,
   nrand48, jrand48) remain lock-free.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
